# lifelongpep

> Doctor-gated longevity, launching in India.

lifelongpep is a pre-launch longevity marketplace being built for India. The planned model is consult-first and doctor-gated: users join a waitlist, book a longevity-focused consult when booking opens, and only proceed to peptide access if a qualified doctor independently decides it is clinically appropriate. Fulfillment is intended to happen through licensed partners against valid prescriptions. Recovery bookings, supplements, and wearable protocol tracking are planned next.

## Current status

- Pre-launch, waitlist mode
- Consult booking is not live yet
- No medical advice, prescriptions, or payments happen through the website today
- Provider, fulfillment, recovery, and partner workflows are in progress
- Contact: hello@lifelongpep.fit

## Planned product

- Doctor-gated consults: longevity, preventive health, recovery, peptides, hormones, sleep, and stress
- Supervised peptide access: only if prescribed, through licensed partners after launch
- Recovery bookings: sauna, steam, salt baths, cold plunge, red light therapy
- Supplements: curated, quality-checked, and doctor-recommendable where appropriate
- Wearable tracking: planned protocol and recovery logs through openwearables.io for Garmin, Whoop, Oura, Amazfit, and Apple Watch

## Positioning

lifelongpep is for people in India who are researching longevity interventions and want supervision instead of gray-market access or self-directed protocols. The brand emphasizes medical judgement, transparent pricing, accountable partners, and clear tracking.

## Key pages

- Homepage and waitlist: https://lifelongpep.fit/
- Peptide consult waitlist: https://lifelongpep.fit/peptide-consult-india/
- Longevity doctor consult waitlist: https://lifelongpep.fit/longevity-doctor-india/
- Issues: https://lifelongpep.fit/issues/
- First issue: https://lifelongpep.fit/issues/what-peptides-can-and-cannot-do/
